message: Update to 1.1.3 - Full encrypted cloud sync for all school datasets (vault + row sync). Close Nova, install UPDATE, reopen. Configure Supabase for advanced multi-PC cloud (Desktop FULL-CLOUD-SYNC-SETUP.txt).
releaseNotes: 1.1.3 - Advanced cloud: AES-GCM vault + nova_sync_records for students/teachers/staff/ops/bills/LMS/settings/license. Offline queue + retries. Default Cloud Sync ON when keys present.
